title: Inventory Shield - Endmir26
description: This pack changes the view of the shield from the inventory and the Hot bar, fitting the 2D style, being different in hand, like the Spyglass and the trident, using the new item options of the Snapshot 24w45a.
body:
This pack changes the view of the shield from the inventory and the Hot bar, fitting the 2D style, being different in hand, like the Spyglass and the trident, using the new item options of the Snapshot 24w45a.

Unfortunately, the banner patterns of a shield are not visible in 2D mode, but in hand view it remains the same.

Also available in Curseforge and Modrinth.
